function.name: temporal_trends
function.description: Analyze temporal trends in a layer over time, detecting seasonal patterns, long-term trends, and anomalous periods. Useful for climate change analysis and temporal pattern detection.

layer_name.description: The name of the layer to analyze for temporal trends (e.g., 'SWOT November 2024', 'ICESat-2 freeboard')

geographical_area.description: The geographical area to analyze (e.g., 'Beaufort Sea', 'Arctic Ocean', 'current view'). Defaults to current view if not specified.

time_start.description: Start time for analysis in ISO format (e.g., '2024-01-01'). Defaults to '2024-01-01'.

time_end.description: End time for analysis in ISO format (e.g., '2024-12-31'). Defaults to '2024-12-31'.

ui.title: Temporal Trend Analysis
ui.details: Analyzing time series patterns, trends, and seasonal variations
